title: Mr Sheen Multi-Surface Polish Spring Fresh 250ml Pack of x 3 - packaging may vary
features: EFFECTIVE DUST REMOVAL - Mr Sheen Multi-Surface Polish with Dust Trap Technology picks up more dust than a cloth alone, ensuring cleaner surfaces.
TARGETS HIDDEN NASTIES - The formula attracts and removes dead skin cells, dried saliva, and decaying insect waste, making your home healthier.
MAGNETIC CLEANING POWER - Acts like thousands of tiny magnets, capturing even the smallest dust particles with every spray.
SMEAR-FREE SHINE - Leaves surfaces with a satisfying, streak-free shine, enhancing the look of your home.
FRESH FRAGRANCE - Enjoy a clean, fresh-polish scent that lingers, adding a pleasant aroma to your living spaces.
description: Product description Mr Sheen Multi-Surface Polish Spring Fresh 300ml Pack of 3 - Mr Sheen Dust contains hidden nasties such as dead skin cells, dried saliva, and decaying insect waste. - These tiny particles are food for dust mites and make the surfaces in your home unclean. - Mr Sheen with Dust Trap Technology is proven to pick up more dust than using a cloth alone. - The unique formula acts like 1000’s of tiny magnets, attracting hidden nasties with every spray and because it’s Mr Sheen it’ll leave your surfaces with that rewarding smear-free shine and fresh-polish fragrance. Ingredients Contains Methylchloroisothiazolinone/Methylisothiazolinone mixture. May produce an allergic reaction.
